WARNING: These test points are for A2779 (820-02655) ONLY. This board uses AUSTRINGER (not Viper) and CLVR (not Monaco). Component designators differ from A2442.
description: Decision trees for 20V DCPS on A2779. Normal boot current is HIGHER than Air (2-4A Pro, 2.5-4.5A Max) due to CLVR and Austringer VRs.

scenarios.meaning: Board draws nothing. CD3217 or charger circuit completely non-functional.

steps.if_wrong: Charger IC not converting. Check CHGR_AUX_OK, I2C to charger.
U5700 not starting (42A design). Check PPVAON_PWR_EN.

scenarios.meaning: Board partially active but well below normal 2-4A boot range.

sub_checks.check: MPMU output caps (page 41) + PMU test points (page 137)

steps.measure: Diode mode on PP3V8_AON_MPMU, PP3V8_AON_SPMU, PP3V8_AON_WLBT, PP3V8_ATC01_LDO, PP3V8_ATC2_LDO branches (page 34)
Diode mode on CLVR0-4 outputs and Austringer outputs
steps.if_wrong: VR output shorted. Thermal cam SoC area.

steps.if_any_missing: Thermal cam that rail -> replace hot component or U8100

scenarios.meaning: Below normal boot range. SoC partially powered but CLVR or Austringer may not be starting.

steps.if_missing: CLVR0 not starting. Check CLVR support (page 57). This is equivalent to A2442 Viper fault.
Austringer not starting. Check PVRVD0N_FAULT_L. Check 5 power stage pages (49-51).

steps.measure: CLVR1 (page 53, GPU0), CLVR2 (page 54, GPU1 Max), CLVR3 (page 55, DPL/Fabric), CLVR4 (page 56, ANE)
steps.if_any_missing: Identify failed CLVR instance. If CLVR3 (Fabric) dead -> board cannot boot. If CLVR2 dead -> Max GPU1 issue only.

steps.if_no_display: Display sequencer UP710 (page 117) or Luxe UP800 (page 118) fault

scenarios.meaning: NORMAL for M2 Pro (2-3.5A) and M2 Max (2.5-4.5A). Fault is peripheral not power.

sub_checks.check: UP710 sequencer (page 117), UP800 Luxe (page 118), eDP connector JP600 (page 116)
Cobra IC (page 94) -- NOT Madea. Check PP1V2_DP2HDMI_DIG, PP3V3_DP2HDMI_RX_TX
SD controller (page 97), PP3V3_AWAKE_SW_SD, SD power VR (page 100)
UF400 (left rear), UF500 (left front), UG400 (right). Test each.
Charger IC (U5200), CHGR_AUX_OK (page 30), battery connector J5151 (page 28)
Camera flex (page 115), camera support level shifter (page 114), FTCAM_RESET_L

scenarios.meaning: Excessive even for Max. Major short or GPU under extreme load.

steps.if_functional: May be charging deeply discharged battery. Should settle to 2-4A.

steps.if_found: Identify component. Common: U5700 (42A regulator into 3V8 short), CLVR (shorted SoC domain), SoC (dead -- BER).

steps.measure: Diode mode: PPBUS -> PP3V8_AON -> PP5V_S2 -> CLVR0 -> Austringer -> CLVR1-4
steps.process: Find shorted rail. Thermal cam that specific area.
